meaning: n.吐唾沫的人,以肉叉烤肉的人
examples: The spitter. And the guy who enjoyed my name so much...
Spitter Spiders had their range and projectile speed decreased.
Spitter totem can be jumped over but you get hit if you try to land on it.
Wine touring solo is always a test if you are self-motoring and not the best of a spitter.
